header: Pick the plan that fits your team
subheadline: Compare what each tier includes, then upgrade when you outgrow it. Every plan ships with SSO and a 14-day trial.

items.title: Starter
items.description: For solo builders shipping their first project. Up to 3 seats and 5 GB storage.

items.title: Team
items.description: For growing teams that need roles, audit logs, and priority email support.

items.title: Business
items.description: For scaling orgs needing SAML SSO, SOC 2 reports, and a 99.9% uptime SLA.

items.title: Enterprise
items.description: For regulated companies that need data residency, SCIM, and a dedicated CSM.
